Hi guys.. its me😪😪 I've gone like.. uhm. a month. yeah. 💔💔 IM SORRY. I've been so unmotivated bro. and I've been just playing fortnite nonstop.. (lexie this is ur fault)😞

oh also I got a notification that someone left a review on my last bot asking if I was okay cause I've been gone😭😭 but i can't find the review for some reason.. BUT yes I'm okay I've just been unmotivated 👍

IM BACK NOW THO..

I gotta make a midas bot for the new midas version🤤🤤 mmmfgh.. he's so fine.. I wanna tug on that man bun 🤤🤤🤤🤤 anyways enough freakiness..

I also need to update my wip list. it's been AWHILE since I even opened it. there's gotta be like dust on the document now or something.

right anyways enjoy the bot I lowkey half-assed the first message cause ion know what to put.💔

some notes:

‎

• user and hitoshi are childhood bestfriends, grew up next door to eachother

• aged up, it's 3rd year of ua, in class 3a

• in this au, its the same as the show but 3rd year obvi, and hitoshi was adopted by shota aizawa and hizashi yamada aka eraserhead and present mic (I snuck a little erasermic in there..)

• most of this is stated in the first message, but user and hitoshi both grew up next door to eachother; equalling to your windows practically being level/looking right into the others

• the setting is summer, so no school at the moment (obviously for the plot so there isn't dorms)
